_comment: Composite deck for the @kitsoki GitHub-loop demo (epic kitsoki-github-agent, demo slice #6). One slidey pitch deck that interleaves title / personas (cast + use-cases) / section slides around TWO rrweb-embedded `video` scenes — NOT MP4. Modeled on .artifacts/slidey-hybrid/dev-story-hybrid.json. The Act-1 clip (the GitHub side) is captured by slidey's rrweb tour engine over the gh-thread.html fixture (.artifacts/github-rrweb-tours/act1-github.tour.json → clips/act1-github.rrweb.json); the Act-2 clip (the kitsoki side) is captured by the kitsoki rrweb harness driving a real `kitsoki web` replay server (tools/runstatus/tests/playwright/github-demo-act2-rrweb-capture.spec.ts → clips/act2-webviewer.rrweb.json). Both clips carry in-log slidey.chapter custom events, so `chapters:auto` derives deck-styled lower-thirds with no sidecar. `rrweb` paths resolve relative to THIS deck JSON. Baked render seek-rasterizes each clip via Replayer.goto(t). meta.mode:pitch is REQUIRED (without it every frame renders blank). meta.resolution matches the 1600x900 capture viewport so embedded video letterboxes clean. Render: node /Users/brad/code/slidey/src/index.js kitsoki-github.deck.json <out>.mp4 → narrated MP4 + .chapters.json sidecar.

personas.name: Mara
personas.intro: Mentions @kitsoki on an issue or PR and reviews what comes back — no App, no webhook to wire up.

personas.name: kitsoki
personas.intro: Reads the mention, dispatches a story, and works the loop — one rolling status, one linkable run, every step on the record.

scenes.title: @kitsoki — a GitHub-native agent
scenes.subtitle: A mention becomes a job becomes a PR — no App, no webhook, no LLM
scenes.narration: This is the @ kitsoki GitHub loop, end to end. A mention becomes a job becomes a pull request — with no GitHub App, no webhook, and no model in the loop at replay time.

scenes.title: The cast
scenes.caption: Two actors, one thread — every hand-off a comment, every run a linkable, replayable record.
scenes.narration: Two actors share one GitHub thread: a maintainer who mentions kitsoki, and kitsoki, a GitHub-native agent. Every hand-off is a comment, and every run is a linkable, replayable record.

scenes.title: Who does what

cases.action: Mentions @kitsoki on a labelled issue or PR
cases.detail: the only ingress — no App to install

cases.action: Reads the label and dispatches the right story
Watches CI, pushes fixes, rebases conflicts
Opens the run link into the kitsoki viewer
Drives the run from the composer

scenes.narration: Across the loop, the maintainer mentions kitsoki and later opens and drives the run. kitsoki reads the label, dispatches the right story, works the pull request — watching CI, pushing fixes, rebasing conflicts, implementing reviewer comments — and asks first when it is not sure.

scenes.title: The GitHub side
scenes.subtitle: Issues and PRs, driven by @kitsoki
scenes.narration: First, the GitHub side — issues and pull requests, driven entirely by an at-mention.

scenes.title: On the thread

cases.detail: one mention, one job, one link

cases.action: Routes a feature issue to the design track
Watches CI, rebases, implements, or asks
cases.detail: the PR loop on one rolling status

scenes.caption: Eight beats on a single thread — single-voice status, never a comment flood.
scenes.narration: On the thread, a bug-labelled mention is the ingress. kitsoki acks with one run link, routes a feature issue to the design track, then works the pull request — all on a single rolling status comment, never a flood.

scenes.title: Mention → dispatch → PR loop
scenes.caption: A faithful GitHub thread: mention ingress through a status edited to done
scenes.narration: Here it plays out on the thread: the mention lands, kitsoki acks with a run link, dispatches by label, watches CI and pushes a fix, rebases a conflict, implements a reviewer's change, asks for guidance when unsure, and edits one rolling status to done.

scenes.title: The kitsoki side
scenes.subtitle: The web viewer and the operator drive
scenes.narration: Now, the kitsoki side — the same job, opened in the web viewer and driven from the composer.

scenes.title: In the viewer

cases.action: Opens the run link into the observer
Lands each turn; the state badge advances

scenes.caption: The run is public and drivable — the trace by handle, the composer as the operator seat.
scenes.narration: The maintainer opens the run link into the observer and watches the live trace stream. Then they type prose straight into the composer; the recording routes it to the slot-bearing intents, and the state badge advances as each turn lands.

scenes.title: Live trace → operator drive
scenes.caption: Real kitsoki web, no-LLM replay: live trace, composer prose, advancing state
scenes.narration: This is a real kitsoki web server in no-LLM replay: the observer streams the live trace, the operator types the idea into the composer, and the run advances state by state — the same job from the GitHub thread, now under the operator's hand.

scenes.title: Mention to merge
scenes.subtitle: GitHub thread and kitsoki UI, the same job
scenes.narration: One mention, one job, one linkable run — the GitHub thread and the kitsoki UI are two views of the same loop, from mention to merge.
And the whole film is a no-LLM, byte-deterministic replay: the runtime is a state machine, and the model is just a traceable callee.
scenes.tagline: A mention becomes a job becomes a PR — every step on the record
scenes.url: the runtime is a state machine; the model is a traceable callee
